name: darshan-nayak-portfolio
description: Full-stack personal portfolio for Darshan Nayak — Angular 18 + Express + MongoDB

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo 'Build complete. Upload dist/ folders to Antigravity.'
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
